titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hashim Al-Hannat

text: و ما كان فيه عن هاشم الحنّاط فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم؛ و أحمد بن إسحاق بن سعد، عن هاشم الحنّاط.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hashim Al-Hannat has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim and Ahmad ibn Ishaq ibn Sa'd, from Hashim Al-Hannat.
